description.zh: 战斗重模拟工具 · 暴露 balance:resim:对指定 scenario 跑 N 次 PvP/PvE 重模拟,返回胜率 + 95% 置信区间(in-process worker)。供 /make-game-design 与平衡工作台数值调优共用。
description.en: Balance Resim tool — exposes balance:resim: runs N PvP/PvE resimulations of a scenario and returns win-rate + 95% CI (in-process worker). Shared by /make-game-design and the Balance workbench for stat tuning.
